name: Eggplant Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Tightly Packed Fresh Spinach (About 1/4 Lb.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make several ½-inch slits on the eggplant and insert garlic slices.
2. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour. Let cool.
3. Peel and cut the eggplant into 1-inch cubes. Cut the pepper in half lengthwise.
4. Place the pepper, with the skin side up, on a baking sheet. Broil 3 inches from the heat for 10 minutes or until charred. Remove from the oven and place in ice water for 5 minutes. Remove from the water, peel, and discard skins.
5. Process the eggplant, pepper, tomatoes, thyme, and salt until chopped.
6. Stuff each shell with 1/3 cup of the mixture. Place in a baking dish coated with cooking spray.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Wash the processor bowl and blade. Combine spinach, cottage cheese, lemon juice, and pepper in the processor and process until smooth.
9. Spoon the spinach mixture over the shells and sprinkle with Parmesan. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes.
Yield: 4 Servings (About 203 Calories per 2 Shells and 1/3 Cup Sauce.)
